summary.title: Summary
summary.content: Software engineer with experience building scalable web platforms and data-driven products using React, Next.js, and modern frontend architectures. Experienced in developing analytics platforms, semantic data modeling tools, AI-powered search interfaces, and high-performance enterprise applications.

items.description:
• Designed and developed an interactive semantic data modeling interface using React Flow, enabling users to visually define tables, relationships, joins, and transformations to build semantic layers for enterprise analytics.

  • Implemented natural language search capabilities allowing users to query enterprise datasets in plain English, powered by semantic context graphs and structured data models to deliver accurate AI-driven insights.

  • Built interactive analytics and data visualization interfaces, including bar charts, dynamic filters, and metric-driven dashboards enabling self-service insights for business users.

  • Improved search page performance and reduced load times by migrating rendering and data handling to a client-side React architecture, enhancing responsiveness and user experience.

• Worked with enterprise clients across healthcare, insurance, and digital products building scalable web and mobile applications.

  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design performant frontend architectures and deliver production-grade applications.

Client Projects:

  • HDFC ERGO Self-Help: Lead frontend developer implementing claims processing, document uploads, and insurance workflows. Integrated Strapi CMS. Tech: Next.js.

  • HDFC ERGO ConveneX: Built an event management platform with admin portal, media gallery, and real-time event updates using Firebase. Tech: Next.js, Flutter.

  • Antara AGEasy: Developed customer platform and admin portal including appointment scheduling, warehouse management, and recommendation engine. Improved SEO and performance using SSR, SSG, lazy loading and code splitting. Tech: Next.js, Flutter Web.

  • Lyfe Apps (Lupin Digital Health): Built healthcare apps integrating Google Fit, Apple Health, and iHealth. Implemented real-time consultations using PubNub and Jitsi. Tech: React Native, Next.js.

  • Cubbies App: Built a children's interactive storytelling and music application using BLE connectivity to interact with a smart music box.

  • HDFC ERGO Baltics Prototype: Developed prototype frontend demonstrating insurance purchase flows including policy selection and premium calculation.
